sections.paragraph:
Original: נבוּכדנאצּר

Transliteration: nebûkadne'tstsar nebûkadre'tstsar nebûkadre'tsôr

Phonetic: neb-oo-kad-nets-tsar'

BDB Definition:

Nebuchadnezzar or Nebuchadrezzar = "may Nebo protect the crown"
  1. the great king of Babylon who captured Jerusalem and carried Judah captive

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
